title: Valentines Day Crosshair
description: ❤️ Simple Valentines Day-themed crosshair with festive Red, pink, and white colors!
body:
Get into the Valentine’s Day vibe with this Valentine’s Crosshair! 💖
This simple UI pack gives your Minecraft crosshair a sweet mix of pinks, reds, and soft whites — perfect for February gameplay. Lightweight, clean, and fully compatible with any other texture pack — just drop it on top in your resource packs list!

Features:

❤️ Valentine’s-inspired pink, red, and white crosshair 🎯
💘 Works with all resolutions (16x and higher)
⚔️ Perfect for PvP or survival
🚀 No performance impact
